summary: System.DllNotFoundException: libSkiaSharp on Blazor WASM when upgrading to .NET 10 due to incompatible native assets.

versionAnalysis.relevanceReason: Issue occurs on .NET 10 upgrade with both versions.

analysis.summary: The issue is caused by SkiaSharp.targets selecting .NET 9 native assets for .NET 10, which are likely incompatible due to Emscripten version differences.

keySignals.text: Started getting this runtime error after upgrading Blazor app from .Net 9 to .Net 10.

analysis.rationale: The MSBuild targets file uses `VersionGreaterThanOrEquals('9.0')` to select native assets. For .NET 10, this evaluates to true, causing the .NET 9 assets (compiled with Emscripten 3.1.56) to be used. .NET 10 WASM likely requires a newer Emscripten version, rendering these assets incompatible. This is a common pattern with WASM upgrades.

resolution.hypothesis: SkiaSharp needs to be rebuilt with the Emscripten version matching .NET 10, and targets updated to select it.
resolution.recommendedProposal: Compile new native assets for .NET 10 and update targets.
resolution.recommendedReason: Standard procedure for supporting new .NET WASM versions.

actionability.reason: Requires verifying the exact Emscripten version for .NET 10 and producing new builds.

actions.description: Explain the likely cause (Emscripten mismatch) and confirm investigation.
actions.comment:
Thanks for the report. This `DllNotFoundException` on .NET 10 is likely caused by an Emscripten version mismatch.

Our build targets currently use the .NET 9 assets (built with Emscripten 3.1.56) for any version >= 9.0:

https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/blob/main/binding/SkiaSharp.NativeAssets.WebAssembly/buildTransitive/SkiaSharp.targets#L40

```xml
<NativeFileReference Include="$(SkiaSharpStaticLibraryPath)\3.1.56\$(_SkiaSharpNativeBinaryType)\*.a" Condition="$([MSBuild]::VersionGreaterThanOrEquals($(TargetFrameworkVersion), '9.0'))" />
```

Since .NET 10 likely uses a newer Emscripten toolchain, these static libraries are binary incompatible. We need to build new native assets for .NET 10 and update the targets file.
